case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. SOLEDAD ALDAY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALDAY, SOLEDAD , AN INDIVIDUAL $2,028.21 PRINCIPAL, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $340.48 INTEREST, $279.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,133.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $279.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 78376731) AS TO DEFENDANT ALDAY, SOLEDAD , AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 78376731) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE.
